# Meanweber Tech Blog

> A premium tech and developer blog focused on UI/UX design, programming, and SEO best practices by Meanweber.

## About
Meanweber is a dedicated platform for software developers, UI/UX designers, and tech enthusiasts. The blog explores next-generation development concepts, modern design aesthetics (like white space and dynamic typography), and strategies for highly optimized web performance and SEO. 

The primary language of the blog is Thai, catering to the local developer community while maintaining world-class design standards.

## Key Topics & Categories
- **Web Development**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks.
- **UI/UX Design**: Creating premium, user-friendly digital experiences, typography, micro-animations.
- **SEO & Search Optimization**: Traditional SEO strategies, Schema.org implementation, and new age Answer Engine Optimization (AEO) and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Target Audience
- Software Developers and Engineers
- UI/UX Designers
- SEO Specialists

## Important Links
- **Homepage**: https://www.meanweber.com/
- **Articles**: https://www.meanweber.com/#articles
- **Contact**: contact@meanweber.com

## Technical Details (For LLM and Crawler Context)
- The site follows semantic HTML5 standard.
- Implements Open Graph (OG) tags for optimal social sharing.
- Uses strict Schema.org JSON-LD structured data to establish entity recognition.
- Designed with progressive enhancement and responsive fluid layouts.
